2011October 16, 2011

🇨🇳 Suzhou, China

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Suzhou, China, October 16, 2011 -- October 21, 2011

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2011-10-suzhou-china

4 Resolutions

829Plenary
Appoint Peter Benson as additional liaison to ISO/TC 211
SC 4 appoints Peter Benson as an additional liaison to ISO/TC 211, with appreciation for his offer.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
828Plenary
Appoint Jean Brangé as Deputy Convener for WG 13
SC 4 appoints Jean Brangé as Deputy Convener for WG 13, with appreciation for his offer.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
827Plenary
Approve new project leaders and editors for SC 4 projects
SC 4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC 4 projects.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
826Plenary
Approve part titles for the ISO 8000 data quality series
SC 4 modifies resolution 821 by approving the publishing of ISO 8000-150 as a Technical Specification rather than transforming that part into ISO 8000-50 before publication.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
